name: management-as-code-documents-api
description: JavaScript NestJS prototype for the Management as Code documents API.

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && babel src --out-dir dist --copy-files && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');function walk(dir){if(!fs.existsSync(dir))return;for(const name of fs.readdirSync(dir)){const file=path.join(dir,name);if(fs.statSync(file).isDirectory())walk(file);else if(file.endsWith('.spec.js'))fs.rmSync(file)}}walk('dist')"
